positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical circular emblem design featuring bioluminescent flora and mythical celestial beasts interwoven with intricate cosmic dust patterns. The central subject is a stylized constellation within a perfect wreath of glowing leaves and stylized deep-sea fauna. Style must be neo-vintage engraved illustration combined with modern geometric elements, rendered with extreme contrast and clean, sharp lines. Use a limited, jewel-toned color palette (deep sapphire, emerald green, rich gold accents) against a dark background. Composition must prioritize a clean, high-contrast silhouette perfect for direct transfer onto apparel fabric. Highly intricate etching details, strong linework, vaporwave influence, central composition, clean silhouettes.
negative: blurry, artifact, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, trademark, low resolution, noisy, grain, jpeg artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad proportions, photorealistic, gradient, gradient shading, messy, dirty, clutter
